inline_comments.message:
So the root element "apexPolicyModel" will not be there from now when a policy is created?

This was the structure until now:
....
  engineServiceParameters:
    policy_type_impl:
      apexPolicyModel:
        key: ...

I guess with this change, it is going to be:
....
  engineServiceParameters:
    policy_type_impl:
        key: ...

And we are maintaining the backward compatibility here by checking for the field and taking from there? Just making sure my understanding is correct.

You can send an apex Policy model encapsulated in an apexPolicyModel: {} object in the TOSCA (just as today) or directly under the Policy_type_impl field.

So all of these work:
1)
engineServiceParameters:
    policy_type_impl:
      apexPolicyModel:
        key: ...
2)
engineServiceParameters:
    policy_type_impl:
        key: ...

3)
engineServiceParameters:
    policy_type_impl: "path/to/model"

Number 3 is for testing
